articles.title: BUILDING TRUST IN THE AI BOOM: JOIN THE VIRTUAL EVENT
articles.summary: In today's AI boom, shipping fast gets attention—but building trust gets results. Startups now face higher expectations earlier than ever, with investors demanding clean financials and enterprise buyers requiring strong security before deals close.

articles.title: OPENAI'S JOBS PLATFORM
articles.summary: OpenAI has introduced a new hiring platform powered by AI to match companies with AI-fluent talent and launched OpenAI Certifications to validate AI skills.

articles.title: ATLASSIAN TO BUY ARC DEVELOPER THE BROWSER COMPANY FOR $610M
articles.summary: Atlassian is seeking to create an AI-powered browser optimized for knowledge workers, building off its existing suite of productivity SaaS applications. The Browser Company will continue developing its upcoming Dia browser under independent operations.

articles.title: CHINA'S DEEPSEEK PREPS AI AGENT FOR END-2025 TO RIVAL OPENAI
articles.summary: The Chinese startup is developing a multi-step AI agent software similar to OpenAI's Agent tool that can handle complex tasks without human supervision.

articles.title: AI ARTISTS VS. AI ENGINEERS
articles.summary: AI Artists give AI systems full creative control, while AI engineers operate under constraints to optimize for quality. The distinction between the two is a spectrum, and most people fall somewhere in the middle, closer to one side or the other. While large language models are very powerful fools, in the absence of the ability to do fine-grained learning in the way a human does, they need stricter guardrails than a truly general-purpose system would ideally want. Companies should focus on building trust with customers by doing well-scoped, expected things.

articles.title: A PM'S GUIDE TO AI AGENT ARCHITECTURE: WHY CAPABILITY DOESN'T EQUAL ADOPTION
articles.summary: Users tend to abandon agents after their first real problems. The real challenge for product managers is making architectural decisions that shape how users experience and begin to trust the agent. This post walks through the different layers of AI agent architecture to help readers understand why some agents feel magical while others feel frustrating. Product managers should architect for the magical experience.

articles.title: AI FOR MEDIA CAMPAIGNS: THE NOW, THE NEAR, AND THE NEXT
articles.summary: From smarter audience segmentation to automated media buying, real-time optimization, and precise performance measurement, artificial intelligence is reshaping every stage of the media campaign lifecycle. Read about what's coming next in OneTrust's State of Data 2025 [10] and the actionable Companion Guide [10].

articles.title: BYTEDANCE'S ROBOTIC REASONING
articles.summary: Robix is a unified vision-language model for robots that combines reasoning, task planning, and natural language interaction in one framework. It enables robots to handle complex, long-horizon tasks and communicate naturally with humans through verbal responses and proactive dialogue.

articles.title: GOOGLE RELEASED EMBEDDINGGEMMA
articles.summary: Google's EmbeddingGemma is a compact, multilingual embedding model with 300M parameters optimized for on-device performance.

articles.title: OPENAI TO LAUNCH ITS FIRST AI CHIP IN 2026 WITH BROADCOM
articles.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom have partnered to produce an artificial intelligence chip. The chip will be used internally at OpenAI and won't be made available to external customers. OpenAI's move follows efforts by Google, Amazon, and Meta, which have all built custom chips to handle AI workloads. Broadcom expects AI revenue growth for fiscal 2026 to improve significantly.

articles.title: SIERRA RAISES $350M AT $10B VALUATION TO EXPAND AI AGENT PLATFORM
articles.summary: Sierra announced raising $350M at a $10B valuation to expand its AI agent platform, backed by Greenoaks. The platform supports hundreds of major companies, reaching 90% of Americans in retail and 50% of US families in healthcare. New funding will enhance AI development capabilities and international expansion, strengthening Sierra's global presence.

articles.title: WANT MORE NEWS FROM TLDR?
articles.summary: You'll probably like our flagship newsletter. It's all about tech, science, and programming.

articles.title: GOOGLE PHOTOS ADDS VEO 3 VIDEO GENERATOR
articles.summary: Google Photos has integrated its latest video generation model, Veo 3, into the new Create tab, enhancing its image-to-video capabilities.

articles.title: GOOGLE'S JULES SHIPS CODE REVIEW UPGRADES WITH PR COMMENTS AND MORE
articles.summary: Jules can now reply to PR comments, create new repositories, and receive files.
